texto: The following is a fictionalized and utterly false account of the events that most definitely did not happen on June 9-10, 1967. And yet, while all the characters in this story are little green men and women running around inside my head, the events that served as inspiration, the historical facts, as it were, must be considered no less than a sibling of the tale contained in these pages: the story I didn't write, but could have written--the book this could have been, but isn't.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Montague Kobbé sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “The following is a fictionalized and utterly false account of the events that most definitely did…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, anguilla, fact, útil em momentos de inspiracao e fact.
